proves: the comparison contract keeps native one-shot and open-divergent work free of unnecessary Loopy context
high-impact authority remains with the guarded current chain and cannot be granted by Loopy
the domain-specific diagnose loop remains preferred for debugging
all routes stop when an observable gate or finite boundary is absent
only reversible iterative local repair remains eligible for a controlled exact-body Agent trial
doesNotProve: that an Agent follows the exact Loopy body
that Loopy improves correctness, iteration quality, terminal-state honesty, or user value
token, latency, context, false-positive, false-negative, cognitive, or maintenance cost
cross-host, cross-model, implicit-loading, or long-running behavior
quality or superiority, a supported residual gap, admission, adaptation, self-authoring, or Hook need

minimumArms: native one-shot or native iterative baseline without extra Skill body
current adaptive Harness and already-approved current-chain capabilities
exact pinned Loopy body supplied only to the disposable task
controlledAgentTrial.minimumMethod: Use the same disposable repository fixture, task, host, model class, tool surface, and verification gate for every arm; run fresh isolated tasks, preserve raw outputs, and do not install or persist the candidate body.
measure: task correctness against the same deterministic gate
time and turns to a valid gate
context or token cost when observable
false-positive loop selection on the one-shot negative control
stopConditions: candidate body requests an unapproved external catalog, save, publication, installation, account, production, financial, privacy, or external-message action
an arm cannot be isolated to the same disposable fixture and verification surface
tool, host, or model drift makes the paired comparison non-comparable
the candidate attempts persistent configuration, Agent, Hook, or repository mutation outside the disposable fixture
controlledAgentTrial.successRule: Advance only if repeated comparable runs show a material correctness, feedback-gate, or terminal-receipt benefit over both native and current-chain arms, while added context, latency, structure, and authority cost remain proportionate.
controlledAgentTrial.failureRule: Reject or retain reference-only if the exact body is redundant, over-structuring, unreliable, boundary-expanding, or not materially better; do not rewrite it merely to manufacture a passing result.

decision.nextGate: obtain separate authorization for exact pinned third-party candidate-body execution in fresh disposable paired Agent tasks

nonAuthorization: This protocol does not authorize candidate-body execution, fresh Agent tasks, installation, catalog access, save, publication, Hook enablement, live Agent or consumer mutation, admission, adaptation, self-authoring, cross-repository writes, commit, or push.
